title: genista angulata
intro: Genista angulata, also known as the angled broom or prickly broom, is a flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Genista angulata include its ability to improve digestion, reduce symptoms of menopause, and support the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. Genista angulata can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
